arts.ttl: Flick reveals ‘Pedri plan’ for Dani Olmo and offers Vitor Roque update
arts.sum: Flick was asked if he had any advice for Roque when it comes to staying in Europe or going back to Brazil, but the German boss was pretty blunt in his answer and made it clear he’s not thinking at all about Vitor’s immediate future since he’s not a Barça player. Pedri is now fully healthy and has not missed a single game because of injury this season, and Flick revealed that a similar plan will be employed to try and help Dani Olmo’s ability to stay fit and get over his muscle problems.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick hits out at referees abuse amid Real Madrid feud
